item.title: About
item.description: About I am a Sr. Software Engineer and Developer Advocate in the Azure Engineering organization at Microsoft. My work focuses on distributed systems, big data analysis, and machine learning pipelines. In my advocacy work, I bring my vast industry research & engineering experience to bear in educating and helping teams design, architect, and build cost-effective software and infrastructure solutions that emphasize scalability, team expertise, and business goals. I am a frequent presenter at world-wide industry conferences and O’Reilly courses instructor.

item.title: Blog Posts Bank
item.description: How Highly Available you are? Is it worth it? Many architects and Infra/Platform developers take great pride on developing highly available systems. We even invented code names for it like three nines or the nines of availability. Do we realy need it? is it all so necessary? There is a long list of requirments that comes with it. Every new logic developer needs to be aware that their code will run in multiple active-active cluster, even active-active-active.

item.title: Thank You
item.description: Thank you for your message. If I won’t get back to you within a week, please know that my twitter direct messages are always open.
